name: Ichimoku Cloud CCI Momentum Gate
edge_hypothesis: Ichimoku TK Transition is validated (PF=1.604, ACCEPT) proving Ichimoku components carry exploitable edge. CCI-as-confirmation is a proven paradigm (Supertrend CCI v4 PF=1.290, ACCEPT). This spec uses a DIFFERENT Ichimoku component — the Senkou Span A cloud line (ISA_9) — as a structural REGIME FILTER rather than using the TK cross as entry timing. When close > ISA_9, price is above the leading cloud boundary, meaning the market is in a structurally bullish environment across the Ichimoku multi-timeframe equilibrium calculation. CCI_20_0.015 crossing above 0 then provides the TIMING — the exact bar where momentum shifts from negative to positive. The mechanism: Ichimoku cloud position answers 'what is the regime?' (structural trend context), CCI zero-cross answers 'when does momentum confirm?' (entry timing). This is fundamentally different from Ichimoku TK (which is a cross-based entry) and from Supertrend CCI (which uses trend-following structure). The cloud acts as a floating support/resistance level that adapts to price action over 9-26 periods, providing broader structural context than any single MA. Expected edge in transitional regimes where the cloud position correctly identifies the new trend direction early.

variants.name: iku_cloud_cci_v1_8to1
variants.description: Core variant. Price above Ichimoku cloud (ISA_9) + CCI zero-cross momentum entry. 8:1 R:R sweet spot. Tests whether Ichimoku cloud position + CCI timing creates an all-regime edge distinct from Ichimoku TK and Supertrend CCI.

components.notes: Ichimoku Senkou Span A — cloud-based structural regime filter. Distinct from TK cross entry.
CCI zero-cross — proven confirmation paradigm (Supertrend CCI v4 ACCEPT).

variants.name: iku_cloud_cci_v2_10to1
variants.description: Extended TP variant. 10:1 R:R (15x ATR TP). Ichimoku cloud provides structural support — when the cloud confirms the regime, moves tend to persist. Higher R:R captures extended transitional regime moves. Transitional PF historically peaks at higher R:R (EMA200 Vortex v2 trans PF=4.321 at 12:1).

components.notes: Ichimoku cloud regime filter — extended TP for transitional persistence.
CCI zero-cross with extended TP for structural cloud-confirmed moves.

advisory_context.novel_element: FIRST use of Ichimoku CLOUD (ISA/ISB position) as structural regime filter combined with CCI zero-cross timing. Different from Ichimoku TK cross (ACCEPT) and Supertrend CCI (ACCEPT) — merges two validated families via different component.

indicator_roles.baseline: ISA_9 / ISB_26 — Ichimoku cloud position as structural regime filter
indicator_roles.volume_volatility: ATR_14 — position sizing and R:R framework
